content:
https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/aeDrt2FkMD6ZWaVS@sirena.org.uk/

So, now more than ever, please make sure your patches are CLIPPY=1-clean to help your maintainers! :)

From what I understand, Mark uses Debian Stable's Rust toolchain, thus Rust 1.85.0, i.e. our current minimum supported version. So what I recommend is checking patches with both the minimum and the latest stable.

Thanks!
